observation: CoinDesk reported USDN dropped roughly 15% during the April 2022 Waves and Vires Finance stress

observation: The Motley Fool reported WAVES fell more than 28% over 24 hours as USDN lost its peg

observation: CoinDesk reported USDN slipped below peg again during the TerraUSD collapse in May 2022

observation: CoinDesk reported USDN around $0.91 in August 2022 as liquidity weakened

observation: CoinDesk cited analysts describing USDN backing through WAVES as around 14% during the August stress
